name: Kharazim
description: A flexible Healer that pairs well with Melee allies who like to dive into the enemy team.
title: Veradani Monk
info: To the monks of Ivgorod, the gods are in all things, and their divine will is proclaimed by the Patriarchs. With unshakable faith, Kharazim carries forth the decrees of the thousand and one gods to the ends of Sanctuary and the realms beyond.

Kharazim.name: Radiant Dash
Kharazim.description: Jump to an allied or enemy unit. Enemies are immediately hit with a Basic Attack.  Stores up to 2 charges.

Kharazim.name: Breath of Heaven
Kharazim.description: Heal nearby Heroes for 295 (+4% per level) and give them 15% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

Kharazim.name: Deadly Reach
Kharazim.description: Kharazim's next Basic Attack increases his Attack Speed and Attack Range by 100% for 2 seconds.

Kharazim.name: Seven-Sided Strike
Kharazim.description: Become Invulnerable and strike 7 times over 2 seconds. Each strike hits the highest Health nearby Hero for 7% of their maximum Health.

Kharazim.name: Divine Palm
Kharazim.description: Protect an allied Hero from death, causing them to be healed for 1200 (+4% per level) if they take fatal damage in the next 4 seconds.

Kharazim.name: Pick Your Trait
Kharazim.description: Choose between Transcendence, Iron Fists, and Insight from the Talents panel.

1.name: Transcendence
1.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals the lowest nearby allied Hero for 104 (+4% per level) and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.

1.name: Iron Fists
1.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 110% bonus damage and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.

1.name: Insight
1.description: Quest: Every 3rd Basic Attack restores 14 (+4% per level) Mana, grants a stack of Insight, and gives 25% increased Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.  Reward: Upon getting 100 stacks of Insight, every 3rd attack also reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.75 seconds.

4.name: Spirit Ally
4.description: Place a Spirit Ally that heals allied Heroes in a large area around it for 2% of their maximum Health every second. Has 150 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Spirit Allies.

4.name: Earth Ally
4.description: Place an Earth Ally that grants nearby allied Heroes 50 Physical Armor against Heroic Basic Attacks, reducing damage taken by 50%. Has 400 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Earth Allies.

4.name: Air Ally
4.description: Place an Air Ally that gives allied Heroes 20% Spell Power, grants vision, and reveals a large area around it. Has 300 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Air Allies.

7.name: Blinding Speed
7.description: Decreases Radiant Dash's cooldown by 2 seconds and increases the maximum number of charges by 1.

7.name: Heavenly Zeal
7.description: Increases Breath of Heaven's Movement Speed bonus to 30%. Radiant Dashing to an ally increases the healing they receive from Breath of Heaven by 50% for 3.5 seconds.

7.name: Blazing Fists
7.description: Increase the duration of Deadly Reach by 100%. Every 3rd Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Deadly Reach by 0.75 seconds.

10.name: Divine Palm
10.description: Protect an allied Hero from death, causing them to be healed for 1200 (+4% per level) if they take fatal damage in the next 4 seconds.

10.name: Seven-Sided Strike
10.description: Become Invulnerable and strike 7 times over 2 seconds. Each strike hits the highest Health nearby Hero for 7% of their maximum Health.

13.name: Quicksilver
13.description: Radiant Dashing to an ally gives Kharazim and the target 30% bonus Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

13.name: Spell Shield
13.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

13.name: Sixth Sense
13.description: While Stunned or Rooted, gain 75 Physical Armor against Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing their damage by 75%.

16.name: Cleansing Touch
16.description: Radiant Dashing to an ally makes them Unstoppable for 1 second.

16.name: Way of the Hundred Fists
16.description: Radiant Dashing to an enemy launches a rapid volley of 6 Basic Attacks dealing 45% damage each.

16.name: Echo of Heaven
16.description: Breath of Heaven heals 75% of its normal amount, but heals a second time 3 seconds later.

20.name: Peaceful Repose
20.description: Divine Palm's healing amount is increased by 75% and its cooldown is set to 5 seconds if the Hero does not die.

20.name: Fists of Legend
20.description: Gain 50% of the benefit from both level 1 talents that were not chosen.

20.name: Storm Shield
20.description: Activate to give all nearby allied Heroes a Shield for 20% of their max Health for 3 seconds.

20.name: Epiphany
20.description: Activate to restore 70% of Kharazim's maximum Mana and refill 2 charges of Radiant Dash.

tooltipMarkup.GenericSpellShieldTalent: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds, reducing the damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
tooltipMarkup.GenericStormShield: Activate to give all nearby allied Heroes a Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of their max Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketStormShield,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MonkAirAlly: Place an Air Ally that gives allied Heroes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,MonkAirAllySpellPowerBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"/>%</c> Spell Power, grants vision, and reveals a large area around it. Has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,MonkAirAlly,LifeMax"/></c> Health and lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MonkAirAllyTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Air Allies.

Has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,MonkEarthAlly,LifeMax"/></c> Health and lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MonkEarthAllyTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Radiant Dashing to an ally increases the healing they receive from Breath of Heaven by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MonkBreathOfHeavenCreateHealerExecute,MultiplicativeModifierArray[MonkBreathOfHeavenDashOfHeaven].Modifier*100" player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MonkBreathofHeavenHeavenlyZealTalentTrackingBehavior,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.

Has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,MonkSpiritAlly,LifeMax"/></c> Health and lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MonkSpiritAllyTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Spirit Allies.
